yearNumbers.label: Starts Earlier
yearNumbers.detail: First day moves from Aug 24 to Aug 23 vs 2026–2027.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break Shifts
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break moves from Mar 29–Apr 2 to Apr 3–7 vs 2026–2027.

yearNumbers.label: Wellness Day
yearNumbers.detail: Presidents Day and Wellness Day combined — all schools and central offices closed.

yearNumbers.label: Easter Monday
yearNumbers.detail: School holiday added for Easter Monday — extends the post-Spring Break closure by one day.

calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Henrico County in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for most students is Monday, August 23, 2027. HCPS continues its staggered start for incoming pre-K and kindergarten students — half begin August 23, the remainder join August 24, and all students are together from August 25 onward. Grade 6 and Grade 9 students also begin August 23 alongside returning grades.

calendarFaqs.q: Is the staggered kindergarten start still used in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. The staggered kindergarten and pre-K start introduced in 2026–2027 continues in 2027–2028. Half of incoming pre-K and kindergarten students begin August 23; the remaining students join August 24. All students are in class together starting August 25. Parents will be notified by their assigned school which date their child is scheduled to attend.

calendarFaqs.q: What changed from 2026-2027 to 2027-2028 in Henrico County?
calendarFaqs.a: The 2027–2028 school year begins one day earlier (August 23 vs. August 24) and ends two days earlier (June 2 vs. June 4). Spring Break shifts slightly later, running April 3–7 instead of March 29–April 2. Thanksgiving Break covers November 24–26. Winter Break begins December 20. The staggered kindergarten start, four-quarter structure, and two-semester calendar continue from 2026–2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Spring Break for Henrico County in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break in 2027–2028 runs April 3–7, 2028. Good Friday (which typically falls the Friday before) is observed as a school holiday in HCPS — check the official calendar for the exact Good Friday date. As in prior years, plan spring travel around the full Good Friday through end-of-Spring Break window for the complete no-school window.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Winter Break for Henrico County in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter Break in 2027–2028 begins December 20, 2027 and runs through December 31. Schools reopen in early January 2028. The exact return date is listed in the official HCPS calendar above.

calendarNotes: Henrico County Public Schools 2027-2028 instructional calendar introduces a staggered start on August 23 for Pre-K, Kindergarten, 6th, and 9th grade students, with all remaining grades joining on August 24. The calendar adds Veterans Day (Nov 11) as a noted holiday, retains Diwali (Oct 29) and Yom Kippur (Oct 11) as student/teacher holidays, and adds Eid al-Fitr (Feb 28) as a student holiday/Professional Learning Day. Spring Break runs April 3-7, 2028, followed by an Easter Monday closure on April 17. The school year ends June 2, 2028, a student half day marking the close of the fourth quarter. Thanksgiving Break is a short three-day closure (Nov 24-26) and Winter Break spans Dec 20 - Jan 1. HCPS continues its four nine-week evaluation periods (quarters) and two-semester structure, with quarter ends on Oct 27, Jan 19, Mar 24, and June 2.
